import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/bobo/StockWinner'\)
from services.factors.daily_factor_calculator import DailyFactorCalculator

calculator = DailyFactorCalculator\(\)

# 测试单只股票
test_stock = "600000.SH"
print\(f"测试股票：{test_stock}"\)

df = calculator.calculate_all_daily_factors\(
    test_stock,
    "2026-03-25",
    "2026-04-02"
\)

if not df.empty:
    print\(f"\\n数据条数：{len\(df\)}"\)
    print\(f"\\n列名：{df.columns.tolist\(\)}"\)
    print\(f"\\n最新数据:"\)
    cols_to_show = ['trade_date', 'close', 'circ_market_cap', 'total_market_cap', 'days_since_ipo', 'ma5', 'ma_5']
    available_cols = [c for c in cols_to_show if c in df.columns]
    print\(df[available_cols].tail\(3\)\)
else:
    print\("返回的数据为空"\)
EOF)

Bash(/home/bobo/StockWinner/venv/bin/python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('/home/bobo/StockWinner/data/kline.db'\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)

cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM kline_data'\)
current_count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

cursor.execute\('SELECT MAX\(trade_date\) FROM kline_data'\)
latest_date = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT stock_code\) FROM kline_data'\)
stock_count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

print\(f'当前 kline_data 记录数：{current_count:,}'\)
print\(f'当前股票数量：{stock_count}'\)
print\(f'最新日期：{latest_date}'\)

conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(/home/bobo/StockWinner/venv/bin/python -c "
import sqlite3
import time

conn = sqlite3.connect\('/home/bobo/StockWinner/data/kline.db'\)

for i in range\(3\):
    cursor = conn.cursor\(\)
    cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM kline_data'\)
    count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]
    cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT stock_code\) FROM kline_data'\)
    stocks = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]
    print\(f'检查 {i+1}: 记录数={count:,}, 股票数={stocks}'\)
    time.sleep\(3\)

conn.close\(\)
")

import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('/home/bobo/StockWinner/data/kline.db'\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)

cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM kline_data'\)
count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

cursor.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT stock_code\) FROM kline_data'\)
stocks = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

cursor.execute\('SELECT MAX\(trade_date\) FROM kline_data'\)
latest_date = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

cursor.execute\('SELECT datetime\(\\"now\\", \\"localtime\\"\)'\)
now = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]

print\(f'检查时间：{now}'\)
print\(f'记录数：{count:,}'\)
print\(f'股票数：{stocks}'\)
print\(f'最新日期：{latest_date}'\)

conn.close\(\)
")
